explicit_text: My name is Rodrigo Botero, and I am originally from Cali, Colombia. I studied topographic engineering and have worked mostly as a teacher and university instructor. Currently, I am finishing my master's degree at the Universidad Javeriana and applying to the PhD program in mathematics at the University of Minnesota. I moved here with my family because most of my relatives live in Minnesota, and I appreciate the peaceful environment and kind people here.

explicit_text: Cali is my hometown in Colombia, a small and warm city where I lived almost all my life. I find it very green and peaceful, which reminds me of Minnesota where I live now. Growing up in Cali shaped my early education and career path before I moved abroad to continue my studies.

explicit_text: Colombia is where I was born and where I started my education and career.
